channel.title: Unclassified on the diary of amuldotexe
channel.description: Recent content in Unclassified on the diary of amuldotexe

item.description: 20230308 1737 hrs I do not intend to structure this page this is lovely as a chaos iykwim what I really seek here is to utulize the copilot to help me write random things on a markdown page Eventually this will be moved to my Secret Compendium I am going to optimize for flow rather than structure The key task is stil about slowing down time by focusing on the breath
